inicio.titulo: Plan your dream trip with AI
inicio.subtitulo: Enter your destination and dates. Our AI searches for flights, hotels, and activities, generating 3 complete itineraries for you to choose from.

planejar.erroDatasPassadas: Departure date must be in the future
planejar.erroDatasOrdem: Return date must be after departure date
planejar.erroDuracaoMaxima: Trip can be at most 30 days long

progresso.falhou: Something went wrong. Please try again.

minhasViagens.semViagens: You haven't planned any trips yet.

erros.geral: An error occurred. Please try again.
erros.limitExcedido: You've reached the limit of 5 trips per hour. Please try again later.
erros.naoAutorizado: You need to be logged in to do that.
